description.p: A PipeWire crossfade mixer. Bridge creates two virtual outputs that you can route your audio to, and mix between them with a single control. For example: send chat audio to one side, and game audio to the other.

ul.li: A crossfade mixer between two virtual outputs, Aux and Main, to play audio through
Create routing rules that automatically route audio to your chosen output
Provide a HeSuVi HRIR file for a user-friendly setup of headphone virtual surround
Create output presets and easily switch between them at the press of a button
Support of the Global Shortcuts portal, allowing you to control your audio while in a fullscreen app
